title: Victory Song

sections.label: Intro
lines: From sunrise skies to twilight hues,
Your love shines bold, forever true.

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Every breath I take, I’ll proclaim,
The greatness of Your holy name.
Your mercy flows, unending stream,
A boundless grace, a living dream.

sections.label: Pre-Chorus
lines: You lift the weak, You heal the heart,
In endless light, You set apart.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Forever I will sing, Your glory reigns,
Through the highest heights and endless plains.
Your kingdom stands, unshaken, strong,
Forever love, my victory song.

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: The stars above reflect Your might,
Your faithfulness outshines the night.
In every storm, Your hand I find,
A guiding hope, a love divine.

sections.label: Pre-Chorus
lines: You calm the waves, You hold the skies,
A faithful King who never dies.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Forever I will sing, Your glory reigns,
Through the highest heights and endless plains.
Your kingdom stands, unshaken, strong,
Forever love, my victory song.

sections.label: Bridge
lines: Let all the earth proclaim Your ways,
Every voice rise in endless praise.
From age to age, Your truth will stay,
A radiant light, a brighter day.

sections.label: Final Chorus
lines: Forever I will sing, Your glory reigns,
Through the highest heights and endless plains.
Your kingdom stands, unshaken, strong,
Forever love, my victory song.

sections.label: Outro
lines: Forever I will sing, Your love remains,
Eternal hope, in endless praise.

epigraph: and I will praise thy name for ever and ever
